description: Vaara governance as standalone MCP server. Risk scoring, intercept, hash-chained audit.

cmd.description: PyPI package providing the vaara-mcp-server entry point
cmd.name: --from

name: io.github.vaaraio/vaara-server

environmentVariables.description: Path to the SQLite audit DB. Defaults to vaara_audit.db in the working directory.
environmentVariables.name: VAARA_DB

environmentVariables.description: Optional shared secret. When set, every tool call must include _api_key in its arguments. Leave unset for single-tenant stdio deployments where process isolation is enough.
environmentVariables.name: VAARA_API_KEY

runtimeArguments.description: PyPI package providing the vaara-mcp-server entry point
runtimeArguments.name: --from

title: Vaara MCP Server
